task.objective: Implement the smallest useful AI PR Evidence Gate: deterministic local code that converts provided static pull request input into an evidence packet separating claims, observed evidence, missing evidence, scope, and review needs.

requirements: Commit GATE-MVP-001 as the first artifact on the branch before implementation edits.
Create packages/evidence-gate with deterministic local static-input evidence packet behavior.
Do not inspect live repositories, use network access, execute target repository code, use model providers, or implement a delivery surface.
The packet must distinguish claims, observedEvidence, missingEvidence, scope, reviewNeeds, and boundaries.
Claims must remain assertions and must not become Evidence by themselves.
Missing evidence must remain visible and must not become confidence.
Identical normalized inputs must produce identical packet output.
Add focused local tests for claim/evidence separation, missing evidence retention, scope boundary preservation, determinism, and no readiness overclaim.
Add root test script wiring without external dependencies or lockfile changes.
Update README.md and the active Phase 2 plan to describe this as a local static-input MVP, not product readiness.
Record only commands actually run in validation evidence.
If cost-risk setup appears, stop with BLOCKED_COST_RISK.
If local long-run or Codex limit is reached, stop with LIMIT_REACHED.

requiredInvariants: No live repository inspection, network access, target-code execution, delivery surface, model provider, or Inference Zone behavior is implemented.
Claims remain distinct from observed evidence.
Missing evidence remains explicit in the packet.
Identical normalized inputs produce identical packet output.
No product Verdict semantic, Trust semantic, Evidence authority class, canonical terminology, or product protocol change is introduced.

requiredArtifacts: docs/engineering/validation-evidence.md command evidence if commands run
stopConditions: The task requires live repository inspection, network access, target-code execution, model provider behavior, delivery surface behavior, or Inference Zone behavior
The task requires changing product semantics, Verdict semantics, Trust semantics, Evidence authority classes, canonical terminology, or product protocols
The task requires external dependencies or pnpm-lock.yaml changes
Local long-run or Codex limit is reached: LIMIT_REACHED
